title: dortmanna membranacea
side_effects: Dortmanna membranacea can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing liver damage, seizures, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Ingesting large quantities of the plant's extracts can lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use of Dortmanna membranacea without proper medical supervision can also result in kidney damage and an increased risk of bleeding. Additionally, the plant's extracts may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes.
